base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of roll — a character (npc) from 1987 mega man. Roll — sister helper NPC (red dress, broom), 2-frame idle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
